items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次声明因美国政府出口管制指令，已全面暂停 Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的 API 访问。相对此前公告无新增技术细节，但意味着任何仍使用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的请求会直接失败，不再可用。已有系统必须立即切换至其他可用模型。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：检查代码中所有调用 Fable 5 / Mythos 5 的位置（按 model id 全文搜索），替换为当前可用的 Claude 模型（如 Claude Opus 4.8）；同时移除任何仅服务于这两个模型的能力假设，并关注后续 deprecation/出口管制名单扩展。

items.title: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
items.original_summary: Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glas...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 推出 Claude Tag，被官方描述为「团队与 Claude 协作的新方式」。摘要中未透露具体是 API 字段、SDK 能力还是协作产品形态，功能边界、计费方式、与现有 model id 关系均不明。从已知信息看更像是产品/协作功能包装，对 API 接口层影响有限。
items.backend_focus: 暂不行动。等官方完整说明 Claude Tag 是 SDK 标签、API metadata 还是 Chat/Console 协作功能后再决定是否接入；目前无可迁移项。

Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries. Produ...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 启动 Claude Corps 全国奖学金项目，面向早期职业者推广 AI 在美国各社区的应用。这是人才与品牌项目，不涉及模型版本、API 字段、SDK、定价或区域可用性变化，对工程系统没有任何影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。属于人才/品牌类项目，与 API、SDK、版本升级完全无关。

items.title: Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries.
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 宣布将 Project Glasswing 扩展至约 150 个新增组织、覆盖 15 个以上国家。Project Glasswing 是 Anthropic 的公益/安全研究项目，不是面向开发者的 API 产品，本次扩展意味着更多组织获得 Claude 能力，但 API 接口层无任何变化。
items.backend_focus: 无。属于公益项目扩展，不涉及 API/SDK/参数/定价变更；如有合规或区域可用性疑问，等官方明确是否对应新的 API region。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across Am...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，属于 Opus 系列模型升级，重点强化编码、Agent 任务与专业工作能力。相对前代 Opus 4.x 在 coding 与 agentic 维度进一步提升，但摘要未给出 context window、max_tokens、Tool Use 行为、定价、区域可用性等具体参数。已有使用 Opus 4.x 的系统应准备评估升级。
items.backend_focus: 在测试环境把调用 Opus 4.x 的 model id 切换为 claude-opus-4-8，跑回归（特别是 tool use、长上下文、code agent 链路）；同时关注 Anthropic 公布的 context window、max_tokens 与定价，再决定是否在生产灰度替换。

items.title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 在首尔开设办公室并宣布与韩国 AI 生态的多项合作，意味着 Claude 在韩国的区域可用性、本地化合规与数据驻留支持有望增强。这是区域扩张公告，摘要未说明是否新增 API region、是否影响 data residency 或限流策略。对已有系统兼容性影响需进一步核实。
items.backend_focus: 关注后续是否在 console/API 文档中新增 Seoul 区域或 KR 端点；如有韩国用户合规要求，可在路由层为 KR 流量增加 region 选项，但目前没有立即的代码变更必要。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期 Anthropic Public Record 报告，属于公司层面的透明度与治理披露，未涉及具体模型版本、API 字段、SDK 或定价调整，对一般开发者无直接工程影响。
items.backend_focus: 无。属于公司治理披露，工程团队无需任何代码或配置变更。
